headline: Ford Launches New Customer Financing Program with Bread Financial
summary: Ford Motor Company (NYSE:F) is included among the 14 Low PE High Dividend Stocks to Buy Right Now. On March 10, Ford Motor Company (NYSE:F) announced a long-term partnership with Bread Financial to launch a co-branded credit card and installment loan program. headline: BMW profit holds up despite Trump tariffs, China woes
summary: German carmaker BMW reported a three percent fall in annual profit on Thursday, despite US tariffs and cutthroat competition in China, far smaller than the double-digit plunges seen at rivals.In common with its German rivals, BMW has also come under intense pressure from local competitors in China, the world's largest car market, although it forecast stable sales by volume in the country for 2026.

content.title: BMW profit holds up despite Trump tariffs, China woes
content.summary: German carmaker BMW reported a three percent fall in annual profit on Thursday, despite US tariffs and cutthroat competition in China, far smaller than the double-digit plunges seen at rivals.In common with its German rivals, BMW has also come under intense pressure from local competitors in China, the world's largest car market, although it forecast stable sales by volume in the country for 2026.

thumbnail.caption: BMW has taken a more flexible approach to electric vehicles (EVs) than some competitors, deciding early on to maintain petrol and diesel options (Kirill KUDRYAVTSEV)

headline: How Aptera's solar powered EV could change transportation
summary: The past 12 months have been anything but electric for some vehicle makers. Both Tesla and Ford have seen sales struggle. Meanwhile, the Trump administration let incentives for new EVs end last year – a further blow to the industry. Enter an upstart like Aptera Motors, which is attempting to scale up production of its first solar-powered vehicle (SEV). Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi sits down with Aptera Motors Co-Founder and CEO Chris Anthony to discuss the state of the industry, the future of transportation, and how he got his start fixing pinball machines.
